primary_metric: Documented soak-window discipline that prevents denominator-dilution measurement noise during future framework-version Phase E windows
success_metrics: CLAUDE.md Data Integrity Framework section gains a 'Soak-window discipline (v7.9.1+)' subsection codifying the freeze-or-backfill rule (T1, measured by presence)
docs/product/backlog.md 'Framework hygiene' section gains a cross-reference entry pointing at the new CLAUDE.md subsection + v7.9 case study §99.4 lesson 2 (T1, measured by presence)

Operator-readable rationale captured for the 2026-05-21 → 2026-05-28 v7.9 Phase E observed regressions (timing_wall_time_pct_post_v6 -9.4pp, adoption_pct_post_v6 -1.6pp, cache_hits_pct_post_v6 -1.7pp) so future operators understand WHY the rule exists (T2, narrative)
kill_criteria: Documentation gets stale and operators ignore it — no enforcement teeth; depends on operator attention. Mitigated by Part 1's promotion clause: enforce if 2 consecutive soak windows show >5pp regression
Future framework versions adopt a different soak-window model (continuous vs phased) — the rule must reference 'soak-window' as a concept, not 'Phase E' specifically
kill_criteria_resolution: Both mitigated by the spec's design. (1) The promotion clause ('enforce if 2 consecutive soak windows show >5pp regression on any post-v6 percentage metric') gives the doc-only rule a concrete trigger for upgrading to a gate. The 2026-05-28 v7.9 baseline + the next post-soak baseline will be the first data points. (2) The rule's wording uses 'soak window' as the generic term and 'Phase E for v7.X' as a specific instance — see CLAUDE.md change in this PR.
scope_summary: Documentation-only fix codifying the soak-window adoption-metric discipline. Adds a 'Soak-window discipline (v7.9.1+)' subsection to CLAUDE.md (freeze adoption metrics OR backfill in same PR) + a backlog cross-reference entry. Rationale: v7.9 Phase E observed 3 process regressions caused by denominator dilution (+9 features), not framework regressions. Future Phase E windows for v7.10+ would repeat the noise without this discipline. ADVISORY at v7.9.1 ship; promotion clause built in (enforce after 2 consecutive >5pp regressions). No gate; no telemetry impact; Phase-E-safe (doc-only).

tasks.description: CLAUDE.md — add 'Soak-window discipline (v7.9.1+)' subsection to Data Integrity Framework section

implementation.notes: Documentation-only; no gate; no telemetry impact. Closes v7.9 case study §99.4 lesson 2 with a codified rule.
